summary.archival_abstract: Official technical documentation titled “Star Atlas Build.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Build / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Star Atlas Assets | Star Atlas Build

Appearance
MenuReturn to top
Star Atlas Assets ​
Looking for visuals, logos, or in-game artwork to power your Star Atlas creation? You’ll find everything we’ve made available for public use in the Star Atlas Canon Asset Repository
Everything in that folder is approved for use under the Terms of Service If it’s not in the folder, it’s not approved for use (yet)
What’s Inside the Asset Library ​
Artwork ​
Characters
Factions (including character leaders)
Land and Claim Stakes
Posters and Collectibles
Resources
Ships
Game Art ​
WebGL assets from SAGE
Ships sorted by brand: Armstrong, Busan, Calico, Fimbul, Ogrika and more
Logos ​
Faction Logos
Manufacturer Logos
Never Alone campaign assets (legacy)
“Star Atlas: Powered by the People” logo
What’s Not Included ​
To keep things clean and legally safe, we don’t include:
Unreleased or in-progress content
Internal design docs or drafts
The official “Star Atlas” logo or stylized wordmark (these are restricted trademarks)
Trade secrets or proprietary elements
Want Something Added? ​
Missing a specific ship or icon for your project? We’re open to requests. Ping us in 💻┃community-developers on Discord with your request, we’ll consider it case by case and may update the repo
